title: Create hit games with the power of AI with Ludo.ai
text:
AI Tools for Games
Generate concepts, create images, sprites, and 3D assets, build playable prototypes, and analyze market trends – all powered by AI, all in one place.
Start with Ludo
Top Ludo.ai Features
Sprite Generator
Image Generator
3D Asset Generator
Audio Generator
Video Generator
Playable Generator
Project
Game Ideator
Ludo Market Score
Market Trends
Game Research
Idea Pathfinder
Ask Ludo
Tutorial Generation
Top Charts Blender
Generate and Animate Custom Sprites and Sprite Sheets for Your Games
Generate unique sprites from text, bring them to life with AI-powered animation, and export game-ready sprite sheets in seconds. Create characters, items, and effects for your 2D games faster than ever.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Bring Your Vision to Life with Ludo.ai’s Image Generator
Bring your game world to life with Ludo.ai's Image Generator. Create stunning concept art, UI elements, textures, sprites, and more with simple text prompts or reference images. Experiment with art styles and find the perfect aesthetic for your game.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
AI-Powered 3D Asset Generator for Game Developers
Generate and download 3D models in multiple formats. Use descriptive text prompts, and create unique 3D models of characters, items, and other objects, without any modeling.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Create Professional Game Audio with Ludo.ai’s Audio Generator
Create studio-quality sound effects, music, and voice acting assets using the best models. Generate specific SFX, compose loopable music tracks, and design unique human or monster voices for your game characters.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Animate Your Game Ideas with the Video Generator
Bring your ideas to life with Ludo.ai's Video Generator. Go from a text prompt or static image to a short, animated clip in seconds. It’s the perfect tool for visualizing gameplay, animating assets, and creating eye-catching content for your game.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Turn Game Ideas into Playable Prototypes with Ludo.ai's Playable Generator
Turn ideas into interactive experiences with the Playable Generator. Define mechanics, genre, or describe an atmosphere. Upload assets or let Ludo.ai's AI assemble a prototype, embracing 'vibe coding' to translate intuitive feel into gameplay. Test loops and get an interactive sense of your game instantly.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Craft Winning Game Ideas with Ludo.ai's Project Tool
Ludo.ai's Project tool isn't just a document editor – it's your AI-powered co-writer. Structure your game's details with customizable templates, then use AI suggestions to generate text and images for mechanics, story, characters, and more. It's collaborative game design, supercharged.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Fuel Your Next Hit Game with Ludo.ai’s Game Ideator
Stuck in a creative rut? Ludo.ai's Game Ideator generates fresh game concepts in seconds. Input keywords, themes, or even existing game titles, and our AI will craft unique and inspiring ideas to kickstart your project.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Validate Your Game Ideas with the Ludo Score
Input your game concept and receive a detailed Ludo Score, assessing its potential based on chart dominance, trend alignment, newcomer impact, and creative edge. Refine your idea with data-backed insights.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Stay Ahead of the Curve with Ludo.ai’s Market Trends Tool
Discover emerging trends, analyze top-performing games, and identify untapped market opportunities. Ludo.ai's Market Trends tool provides a comprehensive overview of the gaming landscape, helping you make data-driven design decisions.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Find Game Inspiration with Ludo.ai’s Search Tool
Explore a vast database of games, images, and icons. Search with phrases, genre, platform, art style, and more. Ludo.ai's AI-powered search helps you quickly find references, analyze competitors, and discover visual inspiration.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Map Out Your Next Hit with Ludo.ai’s Idea Pathfinder
Not sure where to start? Ludo.ai's Idea Pathfinder guides you through key design choices, presenting options, market insights, and even letting you add your own custom ideas. It's the perfect way to structure your brainstorming and kickstart your game development.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Ask Ludo, Your AI Gaming Companion
Get design help, explore new ideas, or research specific games, all within a natural conversation. Ask Ludo integrates seamlessly with ideation, image generation, 3D asset generation, and market research tools, providing a central hub for all your AI-powered needs.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Tutorial Generation
Ludo creates a custom interactive development tutorial, based on your game concept, that is designed to help you go from idea to a playable game. Ludo guides you through each step of the development process, in several game engines.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
Blend Trends Into Innovation with Ludo.ai’s Top Charts Blender
Deconstruct the DNA of chart-topping games, blend their core mechanics, and generate innovative concepts with proven market appeal.  Ludo.ai's Top Charts Blender is a unique ideation tool that lets you fuse elements from the world's most successful games, generating fresh, data-backed concepts that bridge the gap between familiarity and novelty.
Learn more →
Start with Ludo
More than just a collection of tools; it's a unified ecosystem. Generate a game concept, refine it with market data, create stunning visuals, and start creating 3D assets for your prototype - all within Ludo.ai
What Our Users Are Saying
"
All the 2D animations in my game were created using Ludo, and it helped me iterate on combat feel and timing much faster than I could have otherwise. The tool genuinely sped up production.
"
Semih
Indie Developer
"
I think Ludo is amazing. Also as an AI engineer myself, very impressive.
"
deTemplari
AI Engineer

This tool is INSANE. This is legendary guys.

Ludo has become an essential part of our process when we begin to create a new game. It is there to help at every step of the game development process. We're huge supporters of AI, and we'd recommend Ludo to any game developer.
"
Ali
Co-founder, SIFOR
Read Case Study
"
The integration of Ludo into our ideation process helps us to target trends in the market, boost creativity, and streamline the ideation process.
"
Everton

"
If it wasn't for Ludo, I wouldn't have even started making my game. I have zero artistic skills and no formal education — but once I made some test animations in Ludo, I knew I finally had the materials to create something. I now have nearly 50 monsters, each with 5 full animations. And this isn't an ad, nobody paid me for this!
"
Silas
Solo Game Developer
"
I am super impressed by what I've found on your platform. It appears to be best in class. I was totally blown away, in particular, by the ability to generate beautiful musical tracks with vocals.
"
Bo
Game Developer

API & MCP Integration
Beta
Connect Ludo's generative AI to Claude, Cursor, or your own apps. Automate asset creation and streamline your game development pipeline.
Images & Animation
Generate sprites, icons, UI assets, textures, and backgrounds. Create spritesheet animations from your art.
Video & 3D
Generate videos from images with motion prompts. Convert 2D art into textured 3D models.
Audio
Create sound effects, music tracks, and character voices. Clone voices for text-to-speech.
Get Started
Unity Plugin
Used and trusted by top studios and publishers worldwide
